retry_reason: The failure is due to static capacity limits (max_total_mcast_qp_attach / max_mcast_qp_attach). These are fixed attributes; success requires an earlier detachment, so retry is possible only if the caller expects a detachment. The function itself does not provide a mechanism for transient retry.
